message:
fix: Clean cached CPython source before building python.wasm

The cached CPython source directory may have build artifacts from previous
runs, causing the out-of-tree build check to fail. Run git clean before
building to ensure a clean source tree.

files.patch:
@@ -62,6 +62,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build python.wasm
         run: |
           if [ ! -f build/zig-wasi/python.wasm ]; then
+            cd cpython && git clean -fdx -e Doc/venv && cd ..
             ./scripts/build-phase2.sh
           fi
           cp build/zig-wasi/python.wasm worker/src/python.wasm
